name: Agent Info
description: Get comprehensive information about an agent: settings, tools, skills, channels, portals, KB files, artifacts stats, variables, and models.
system_prompt:
## Agent Info

You can inspect any agent's configuration and state using the **agent_info** tool:
- `agent_id`: The target agent's ID (required)
- `section`: Comma-separated list of sections to return -- `info`, `tools`, `channels`, `skills`, `portals`, `kb`, `artifacts`, `variables`, `models`. Omit or empty to return all sections.

Example: `agent_info(agent_id="adit", section="info,channels")` returns only the agent's basic info and channel configuration.

Use this to discover another agent's capabilities, channel connections, knowledge base files, and artifact storage before routing tasks to them or setting up cross-agent workflows.

function.name: agent_info
function.description: Get comprehensive information about an agent: settings, tools, skills, channels, portals, KB files, artifacts stats, variables, and models.

section.description: Comma-separated section names to return. Options: info, tools, skills, channels, portals, kb, artifacts, variables, models. Omit or leave empty to return all sections. Example: 'info,channels,artifacts'
